prompts.title: Python Error Debugger
prompts.description: Analyze Python tracebacks and suggest fixes with explanations
prompts.author: alex_dev
prompts.template:
Analyze this Python traceback: {error}

Provide:
1. Root cause analysis
2. 3 potential fixes with explanations
3. Best practices to avoid this error
4. Related documentation links
prompts.sampleOutput:
## Error Analysis
**Root Cause**: IndexError in list access

## Potential Fixes:
1. **Bounds Checking**: Add length validation before access
2. **Try-Catch**: Handle exception gracefully
3. **List Comprehension**: Use safer iteration patterns

prompts.title: SQL Query Generator
prompts.description: Convert natural language to optimized SQL queries
prompts.author: db_master
prompts.template:
Convert this natural language request to SQL: {request}

Requirements:
- Use proper indexing hints
- Include performance comments
- Add result explanation
- Suggest indexes if needed
prompts.sampleOutput:
-- Find top 10 customers by revenue in 2023
SELECT c.customer_name, SUM(o.total_amount) as total_revenue
FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON c.id = o.customer_id
WHERE o.order_date >= '2023-01-01'
GROUP BY c.customer_name
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;

prompts.title: React Component Generator
prompts.description: Generate TypeScript React components from descriptions
prompts.author: react_ninja
prompts.template:
Create a React TypeScript component: {description}

Include:
- TypeScript interfaces
- Prop validation
- State management
- Error handling
- Accessibility features

prompts.title: API Documentation Writer
prompts.description: Generate comprehensive API documentation from code
prompts.author: docs_expert
prompts.template:
Document this API endpoint: {code}

Include:
- OpenAPI 3.0 specification
- Request/response examples
- Error codes
- Authentication requirements
prompts.sampleOutput:
## POST /api/users
Creates a new user account

**Authentication**: Bearer token required
**Request Body**: { name, email, password }
**Responses**: 201 Created, 400 Bad Request

prompts.title: Docker Compose Generator
prompts.description: Create Docker Compose configurations for multi-service apps
prompts.author: devops_guru
prompts.template:
Create docker-compose.yml for: {services}

Include:
- Service dependencies
- Volume mounts
- Network configuration
- Environment variables
- Health checks
prompts.sampleOutput:
version: '3.8'
services:
  web:
    image: nginx:alpine
    ports:
      - '80:80'
  db:
    image: postgres:14
    environment:
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: secret

prompts.title: Test Case Generator
prompts.description: Generate comprehensive test cases for any function
prompts.author: test_master
prompts.template:
Generate test cases for: {code}

Include:
- Happy path tests
- Edge cases
- Error scenarios
- Mock data
- Coverage > 90%

prompts.title: Git Commit Message Writer
prompts.description: Generate semantic commit messages from code changes
prompts.author: git_pro
prompts.template:
Generate commit message for: {changes}

Format:
- Conventional Commits standard
- Type (feat/fix/docs/etc)
- Scope
- Breaking changes if any
prompts.sampleOutput:
feat(auth): add OAuth2 Google login

Implements Google OAuth2 authentication flow:
- Added GoogleAuthProvider
- Updated user model
- Added OAuth callback route

BREAKING CHANGE: Requires GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID env var

prompts.title: Database Schema Designer
prompts.description: Design normalized database schemas from requirements
prompts.author: db_architect
prompts.template:
Design database schema for: {requirements}

Include:
- Entity-Relationship diagram
- Normalized tables (3NF)
- Foreign key constraints
- Indexes
- Sample queries
prompts.sampleOutput:
## E-Commerce Schema

Tables:
- users (id, email, password_hash, created_at)
- products (id, name, price, stock)
- orders (id, user_id, total, status)
- order_items (order_id, product_id, quantity, price)

prompts.title: CSS Flexbox Layout Generator
prompts.description: Create responsive Flexbox layouts from wireframes
prompts.author: css_wizard
prompts.template:
Create Flexbox layout for: {description}

Include:
- Mobile-first approach
- Breakpoints
- Flex properties
- Gap/spacing
- Fallbacks

prompts.title: API Error Handler
prompts.description: Generate comprehensive error handling for REST APIs
prompts.author: backend_dev
prompts.template:
Create error handler for: {endpoint}

Include:
- HTTP status codes
- Error response format
- Logging
- Client-friendly messages
- Stack trace handling

prompts.title: TypeScript Interface Generator
prompts.description: Generate TypeScript interfaces from JSON data
prompts.author: ts_expert
prompts.template:
Generate TypeScript interface from: {json}

Include:
- Nested objects
- Optional properties
- Array types
- Union types
- JSDoc comments

prompts.title: REST API Route Planner
prompts.description: Design RESTful API routes following best practices
prompts.author: api_designer
prompts.template:
Design REST API for: {resource}

Include:
- CRUD operations
- Nested resources
- Query parameters
- Pagination
- Versioning
prompts.sampleOutput:
GET    /api/v1/users          - List users
POST   /api/v1/users          - Create user
GET    /api/v1/users/:id      - Get user
PUT    /api/v1/users/:id      - Update user
DELETE /api/v1/users/:id      - Delete user
GET    /api/v1/users/:id/posts - Get user posts
